title: BKSY Analyst Rating, Sentiment and Price Forecast
text: BlackSky Technology (BKSY) has a consensus rating of Strong Buy, with 9 Buy ratings and 3 Hold ratings. Analyst price targets vary across sources with an average price target of $40.64 and a 12-month average price target of $40.50, with a high of $50 and low of $34. Recent analyst activity shows bullish sentiment with multiple price target increases including Jefferies raising its price target to $50 from $27, Deutsche Bank raising its price target to $35 from $23, and Oppenheimer raising its price target to $50 from $31. The consensus rating is Strong Buy based on 7 buy ratings, 1 hold rating, and 0 sell ratings, indicating strongly bullish sentiment among analysts covering BlackSky Technology for 2026.
